title: clitoria pudica
intro: Clitoria pudica, also known as the touch-me-not or sensitive plant, is a tropical plant species native to South America and Southeast Asia, characterized by its compound leaves and delicate flowers. The medicinal properties of Clitoria pudica include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Clitoria pudica include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Clitoria pudica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
